nl_query: List user auxiliary roles that expired last month.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.id, au.user_id, au.display_name, uar.auxiliary_role, uar.effective_from, uar.effective_to, au_granted.display_name AS granted_by
FROM   app_user au
JOIN   user_auxiliary_role uar ON au.id = uar.user_id
LEFT   JOIN app_user au_granted ON au_granted.id = uar.granted_by
WHERE  uar.effective_from <= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
  AND (uar.effective_to IS NULL OR uar.effective_to >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'))
ORDER  BY uar.effective_from DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.user_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
